mapper.select: SELECT id, identity, memory, parent_id, create_time, update_time FROM long_term_memory WHERE identity = #{identity} ORDER BY parent_id ASC NULLS FIRST, id ASC
SELECT id, identity, memory, parent_id, create_time, update_time FROM long_term_memory WHERE identity = #{identity} AND parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, identity, memory, parent_id, create_time, update_time FROM long_term_memory WHERE identity = #{identity} AND memory = #{memory} limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO long_term_memory (identity, memory, parent_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{identity}, #{memory}, #{parentId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memory SET memory = #{memory}, parent_id = #{parentId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
